chart.title: Psychiatrists per 100,000 people
chart.subtitle: The number of psychiatrists per 100,000 people in the population.
chart.note: Data points are taken as single-year observations between 2015 and 2020, depending on the country.
chart.citation: WHO Mental Health Atlas 2020 via UNICEF (2023)
